name: M4A4 | 黑色魅影
descriptionEn: More accurate but less damaging than its AK-47 counterpart, the M4A4 is the full-auto assault rifle of choice for CTs. It has been custom painted with a stylized blue-magenta woman over a grayscale background. \"She grabbed what she could and disappeared into a decaying dystopia\"
descriptionZh: 与同级的 AK-47 相比更精准，但杀伤力更低，M4A4 是反恐精英可选的全自动突击步枪。 这把武器定绘了一名在灰度背景下一身蓝红风格的女子。 “她抓住了她能够到的一切，消失在腐朽的地狱中”
